gnomad.note: Rare but recurrent in European cohorts; PM2 not strictly applicable

insilico.note: approximate; predictors mixed below the PP3/BP4 thresholds

literature.title: BRCA1 variant interpretation in BRCT and coiled-coil domains.
literature.abstract: Population data for p.Arg1347Gly in BRCA1 show recurrence in healthy controls; no segregation analysis is currently available.

literature.title: Functional implications of BRCA1 non-BRCT missense variants.
literature.abstract: Multiple BRCA1 missense variants outside the RING and BRCT domains, including p.Arg1347Gly, lack robust functional or segregation data and remain VUS in ClinVar.

_ground_truth.note: ClinVar split between VUS and LB; population_first should lean LB on BS1-supporting; insilico_first and conservative should hold VUS
